## Describe the bug
Apologies for all the issues recently... I'm only raising for components that don't seem to be working out of the box. After implementing CountFx, the number doesn't animate at all.

## To reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to [CountFX docs page](https://docs.once-u
test_description_zh: 在页面中添加 CountFx 组件并设置一个目标数值，观察页面加载后该数字是否从初始值平滑动画过渡到目标数值。
expected_result_zh: CountFx 组件应在页面加载后自动播放数字递增/递减动画，从起始值平滑过渡到设定的目标数值，而非直接静态显示最终数字。
